narration: Catalysts speed up reactions without being used up. How do they do it?
visual_description: Hook visual: Catalysts speed up reactions without being used up. How do they do it?
ai_image_prompt: Hook visual: Catalysts speed up reactions without being used up. How do they do it?
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Hook visual: Catalysts speed up reactions without being used up. How do they do it?

narration: In both industry and biology, they’re essential. Think of them as secret agents in chemical reactions.
visual_description: Context visual: In both industry and biology, they’re essential. Think of them as secret agents in chemical reactions.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: In both industry and biology, they’re essential. Think of them as secret agents in chemical reactions.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: In both industry and biology, they’re essential. Think of them as secret agents in chemical reactions.

narration: Without catalysts, many reactions would take ages. They lower the energy needed to start, speeding up processes.
visual_description: Escalation visual: Without catalysts, many reactions would take ages. They lower the energy needed to start, speeding up processes.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: Without catalysts, many reactions would take ages. They lower the energy needed to start, speeding up processes.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: Without catalysts, many reactions would take ages. They lower the energy needed to start, speeding up processes.

narration: For example, enzymes are biological catalysts vital for digestion. Without them, we couldn’t break down food.
visual_description: Evidence visual: For example, enzymes are biological catalysts vital for digestion. Without them, we couldn’t break down food.
ai_image_prompt: Evidence visual: For example, enzymes are biological catalysts vital for digestion. Without them, we couldn’t break down food.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Evidence visual: For example, enzymes are biological catalysts vital for digestion. Without them, we couldn’t break down food.

narration: Catalysts are everywhere! They’re not just in labs; they shape our world by making reactions efficient.
visual_description: Payoff visual: Catalysts are everywhere! They’re not just in labs; they shape our world by making reactions efficient.
ai_image_prompt: Payoff visual: Catalysts are everywhere! They’re not just in labs; they shape our world by making reactions efficient.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Payoff visual: Catalysts are everywhere! They’re not just in labs; they shape our world by making reactions efficient.
